ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program type (e.g., business attraction, retention, expansion) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the program was implemented */,
  "gross_revenue_loss" TEXT /* Gross revenue loss associated with the program */,
  "reimbursement_offset" TEXT /* Reimbursement or offset amount for the program */,
  "net_revenue_loss" TEXT /* Net revenue loss after reimbursement */,
  "type_of_loss" TEXT /* Type of loss (e.g., passive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the program ended or is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the program is implemented */,
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding source for the program */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_type_id") REFERENCES program_types ("program_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_types" (
  "program_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program type */,
  "program_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the program type (e.g., business attraction, retention, expansion) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent program type to support hierarchical program types */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program type record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program type record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program type record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES program_types ("program_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_losses" (
  "revenue_loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue loss */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the revenue loss */,
  "revenue_loss_amount" TEXT /* Amount of revenue loss */,
  "revenue_loss_year" INTEGER /* Year the revenue loss occurred */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the revenue loss record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue loss record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the revenue loss record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue loss record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_losses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reimbursements" (
  "reimbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reimbursement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the reimbursement */,
  "reimbursement_amount" TEXT /* Amount of reimbursement */,
  "reimbursement_year" INTEGER /* Year the reimbursement occurred */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the reimbursement record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reimbursement record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the reimbursement record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reimbursement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reimbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reimbursements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_revenue_losses" (
  "net_revenue_loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net revenue loss */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the net revenue loss */,
  "net_revenue_loss_amount" TEXT /* Amount of net revenue loss */,
  "net_revenue_loss_year" INTEGER /* Year the net revenue loss occurred */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the net revenue loss record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the net revenue loss record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the net revenue loss record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the net revenue loss record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("net_revenue_loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_revenue_losses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loss_types" (
  "loss_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss type */,
  "loss_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loss type (e.g., passive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loss type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the loss type record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loss type record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the loss type record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loss type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_years" (
  "program_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program year */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the program was implemented */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program year record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program year record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program year record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_years_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level or permission level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access log record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_performance" (
  "program_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program performance metric */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the metric */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., revenue loss, reimbursement) */,
  "performance_value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "performance_year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was calculated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program performance record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program performance record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program performance record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_performance_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_benchmarks" (
  "program_benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program benchmark */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark (e.g., revenue growth, job creation) */,
  "benchmark_value" TEXT /* Value of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_year" INTEGER /* Year the benchmark was calculated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program benchmark record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program benchmark record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program benchmark record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program benchmark record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_benchmarks_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_impact" (
  "program_impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program impact */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the impact */,
  "impact_name" TEXT /* Name of the impact (e.g., economic growth, job creation) */,
  "impact_value" TEXT /* Value of the impact */,
  "impact_year" INTEGER /* Year the impact was calculated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program impact record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program impact record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program impact record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program impact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_impact_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_outcomes" (
  "program_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program outcome */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome (e.g., revenue growth, job creation) */,
  "outcome_value" TEXT /* Value of the outcome */,
  "outcome_year" INTEGER /* Year the outcome was calculated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the program outcome record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program outcome record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the program outcome record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program outcome record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
